description_long: This object is a stylized, multi-armed candelabrum with a geometric, faceted design and a broad, polygonal base for stability. The central column is vertically ribbed and tapers upward, supporting four outstretched arms, each ending in a circular candle holder. Each holder contains a short, cylindrical candle, all of which are unlit and lack visible wicks. The entire structure is rendered in a uniform, matte gold or brass color, giving it an elegant yet modern appearance. The arms are angular and branch out symmetrically, providing a balanced and decorative look. The base is wide and heavy, suggesting the object is designed to rest securely on flat surfaces such as tables or pedestals.
description: A geometric, gold-colored candelabrum with four arms and a wide, faceted base, each arm holding an unlit candle. The design is modern and decorative, suitable for tabletop display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three visible arms extending from the central column, with the base's faceted edges clearly defined.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the fourth arm and providing a better look at the symmetry of the arms and holders.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the angular branching of the arms and the even spacing of the candle holders.
description_view_3: Rear view with all four arms and holders visible, highlighting the uniformity and balance of the design.
